## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code implemented following SOLID/SRP
- [ ] Updated/created relevant documentation
- [ ] Updated/created ADR if architecture changed
- [ ] Tests added/updated (unit + integration where applicable)
- [ ] Ran `make lint`, `make test`, `make docs-build`
- [ ] Atomic commits used
- [ ] Updated `docs/status.md` if needed
